title: Turn raw content into designed layouts
subtitle: Upload a document, paste text, or fetch a link. AI restructures the content, then our code renders it with switchable layout templates.

editorial.title: Editorial
editorial.description: Monocle-inspired magazine style with warm paper tones, serif titles, and sophisticated editorial pacing.

bento.title: Bento
bento.description: Apple Keynote-style dark modular cards with orange accents, scannable blocks, and a product-focused visual system.

spotlight.title: Spotlight
spotlight.description: Stripe/Linear-inspired clean timeline with blue-purple gradients, bold emphasis, and glassmorphism cards.

mono.title: Mono
mono.description: Swiss International Style with Helvetica aesthetics, zero-radius borders, strict black-and-white grid discipline.

newspaper.title: Newspaper
newspaper.description: New York Times-style front page with serif typography, dual-column layout, and classic editorial authority.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.description: Behance-inspired exhibition panels with purple-pink gradients, glass cards, and curated showcase flow.

blueprint.title: Blueprint
blueprint.description: Dark engineering-diagram aesthetic with cyan accents, monospace headers, and structured specification blocks.

aurora.title: Aurora
aurora.description: Nordic-inspired multi-color gradients with green-indigo glass surfaces and an atmospheric reading experience.

dossier.title: Dossier
dossier.description: McKinsey-style executive briefing with key-findings panels, data-forward hierarchy, and corporate precision.

pulse.title: Pulse
pulse.description: Cyberpunk neon energy with rose-orange gradients on dark canvas, glowing cards, and high-impact rhythm.

upload.text_placeholder: Paste notes, transcripts, articles, reports, or any long-form content here...
upload.upload_hint: Supports PDF, DOCX, XLSX, TXT, MD
upload.link_hint: Enter a public URL. We'll extract the readable content first, then design the layout.
upload.pdf_desc: Reports, decks, whitepapers, spreadsheets, and reading materials

preview.title: Your designed layout
preview.subtitle: Switch templates instantly without regenerating the content.
preview.mode_hint_desktop: Desktop mode keeps a wider canvas for landscape-friendly previews and exports.
preview.mode_hint_mobile: Mobile mode renders a narrow long-image version that is readable on phones without zooming.
preview.empty: No layout yet. Generate one from the input tab to preview it here.
preview.toast_no_layout: Generate a layout first before using preview actions.
preview.download_success: Image ready! Saving to your device...
preview.download_error: Failed to export image. Please try again.
preview.ocr_processing: Scanned PDF detected, performing OCR recognition...

errors.processing_failed: File processing failed. Please try again.
errors.generation_failed: Layout generation failed. Please try again.
errors.insufficient_credits: Insufficient credits! Need {required} credits, but only {remaining} credits available.
errors.insufficient_credits_short: Insufficient credits. Please top up and try again.
errors.ocr_no_text: OCR failed to extract any text.
